html:
Exclusive to:

“A useful healing device but only for merm, after all, the Mosquitos are mostly full of Merm blood to begin with.”

-

The Blood Shot is a character-specific Item craftable only by Wurt with the Itchcraft I Skill. The Blood Shot can be used to heal 16 HP to Wurt players (even if they don't have Itchcraft I) or 100 HP to Merms.

Itchcraft II

If Blood Shot is used by a Wurt player with the Itchcraft II Skill, it heals an additional 9 HP over time in increments of 1 for Wurt, and an additional 50 HP over time in increments of 5 for Merms.

Gallery

  • Blood Shot concept art from Staying Afloat update stream from Rhymes with Play.

"A revitalizing transfusion for iron-deficient merms."

Miscellaneous
"mosquitomermsalve"
“It's the latest buzz among the merms.”
–Wilson
“This reminds me of a nightmare I had once.”
–Willow
“Wolfgang already hates needles... this make it even worse.”
–Wolfgang
“Don't worry, this will only hurt for a moment.”
–Wendy
“HAVING BLOOD MUST BE TERRIBLE”
–WX-78
“The infusion of fresh blood seems to boost a merm's overall health.”
–Wickerbottom
“I guess there's some justice to it.”
–Woodie
“Let's test it on one of those merms, shall we?”
–Maxwell
“'Tis the mark öf a nöble leader tö care för her warriörs sö.”
–Wigfrid
“We're just glad it's not for us.”
–Webber
“Thankfully, it's not for me.”
–Warly
“Bzzt juice”
–Wormwood
“I almost feel sorry for the bloodsucker. Almost.”
–Winona
“No need to squirm, it's made for a Merm.”
–Wortox
“Mermfolk medicine, florp!”
–Wurt
“That poor mosquito...”
–Walter
“No thank you.”
–Wanda
“A useful healing device but only for merm, after all, the Mosquitos are mostly full of Merm blood to begin with.”
-
The Blood Shot is a character-specific Item craftable only by Wurt with the Itchcraft I Skill. The Blood Shot can be used to heal 16 HP to Wurt players (even if they don't have Itchcraft I) or 100 HP to Merms.
Itchcraft II[edit | edit source]
If Blood Shot is used by a Wurt player with the Itchcraft II Skill, it heals an additional 9 HP over time in increments of 1 for Wurt, and an additional 50 HP over time in increments of 5 for Merms.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Blood Shot là một Vật phẩm dành riêng cho nhân vật chỉ có thể chế tạo được bởi Wurt với Kỹ năng Itchcraft I. Blood Shot có thể được sử dụng để hồi 16 HP cho người chơi Wurt (ngay cả khi họ không có Itchcraft I) hoặc 100 HP cho Người Cá.
